response.justification: Candidate brings 15+ years of polyglot full-stack experience, current Staff title at re:cinq with hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work, plus prior exposure to high-throughput systems at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic. However, the resume shows no explicit Python experience (a must-have), limited evidence of large-scale distributed systems ownership at staff level, and no clear track record of cross-functional technical strategy leadership. The AI-native tooling work at re:cinq is the most relevant signal but is recent and lightly described.
strengths: Current Staff role with hands-on MCP and agentic workflow tooling experience
Prior high-throughput, low-latency systems work at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby
Strong TypeScript/Node.js background and broad polyglot engineering breadth
concerns: No Python listed in skills or employment history despite it being a must-have
Distributed-systems depth and scale ownership not clearly demonstrated at staff level
Limited evidence of stakeholder management and cross-functional technical strategy

key_factors.factor: Hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling experience
